text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder has invited me to visit an
exhibition on Umamusume history together.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
So this is how passion for racing gets passed
down.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The walls are lined with a plethora of items, from
photos of past races to the cleats legendary
Umamusume wore early in their careers. Even
letters to their trainers are on display.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Lessons of the past lead us to new discoveries.
That rings so true as I walk through these halls.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
The passion and grit from these runners come
across loud and clear from within each display.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I must do all of them proud.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As a fellow Umamusume who carries on their
legacy, Grass Wonder seems to enjoy exploring
this display of past racers' experiences.

text_block_list.name: Man A
text_block_list.text:
This one's face is cute, but she ain't exactly got
curves. I've seen better. Fifty-seven points!

text_block_list.name: Man B
text_block_list.text:
Pretty generous if you ask me. Look how
desperate she looks racing in this photo.
Forty-three points, tops!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Huh... It seems some people just can't keep their
voices down.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two offenders receive many unpleasant
glances from the other visitors, but they seem
unwilling to turn it down a notch.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I'll be right back.
choice_data_list: Be careful not to provoke them, okay?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hehe, thank you for your concern.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: But there are lines that should never be crossed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder briskly walks up to the men and
taps them on their shoulders.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Might I ask what the two of you have come here
to do?

text_block_list.name: Man A
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
If that is the only manner of evaluation you care
to give these runners, then perhaps this isn't the
right place for you.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
You're disturbing those of us who came here to
enjoy history. So would you please see yourselves
out the door... And I mean now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her cold and straightforward tone must have
terrified the two men, because they both rush out
the door in a flash.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Perhaps that was... excessive of me.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
But I simply couldn't allow them to continue like
that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She smiles softly, but I can tell that behind her
gentle demeanor there lies a strong sense of
conviction.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She approaches the men and says, "May I have a
word?"

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Your loud and rude remarks are disturbing the
guests and staff.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Personally, I don't think that kind of talk is
appropriate for this establishment. Am I wrong?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a stern talking-to, the men must have
noticed all the other onlookers, because they
awkwardly begin making for the exit.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I don't like to judge others for their personal
tastes, but...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I just couldn't let their utter disrespect for history
slide.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Behind Grass Wonder's rueful smile, I can see she
harbors a powerful respect for her Umamusume
forebears.
